languages.text: "Вопрос крайне деликатный, но, думаю, ты имеешь право знать, раз мы разделяем одну цель". {n}Женщина пристально смотрит на вас.{/n}
"It is a matter of extreme delicacy, but I believe you have the right to know since we share the same goal." {n}She stares at you intently.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Вопрос крайне деликатный, но, думаю, ты имеешь право знать, раз мы разделяем одну цель". {n}Женщина пристально смотрит на вас.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "It is a matter of extreme delicacy, but I believe you have the right to know since we share the same goal." {n}She stares at you intently.{/n}
"It is a matter of extreme delicacy, but I believe you have the right to know since we share the same goal." {n}She stares at you intently.{/n}
"It is a matter of extreme delicacy, but I believe you have the right to know since we share the same goal." {n}She stares at you intently.{/n}

languages.text: «Es un asunto extremadamente delicado, pero creo que tiene derecho a saberlo, ya que compartimos el mismo objetivo». {n}Te observa con intensidad.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It is a matter of extreme delicacy, but I believe you have the right to know since we share the same goal." {n}She stares at you intently.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Es un asunto extremadamente delicado, pero creo que tiene derecho a saberlo, ya que compartimos el mismo objetivo». {n}Te observa con intensidad.{/n}

languages.text: “这事极为敏感，不过既然我们目标一致，我认为你有权知情。”{n}她紧紧盯着你。{/n}
languages.original_text: "It is a matter of extreme delicacy, but I believe you have the right to know since we share the same goal." {n}She stares at you intently.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “这事极为敏感，不过既然我们目标一致，我认为你有权知情。”{n}她紧紧盯着你。{/n}

languages.text: « C'est une question des plus délicates, mais puisque nous partageons le même objectif, il me semble que vous êtes en droit de savoir. » {n}Elle vous regarde attentivement.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It is a matter of extreme delicacy, but I believe you have the right to know since we share the same goal." {n}She stares at you intently.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « C'est une question des plus délicates, mais puisque nous partageons le même objectif, il me semble que vous êtes en droit de savoir. » {n}Elle vous regarde attentivement.{/n}

languages.text: "Bu son derece hassas bir mesele ancak aynı amacı paylaştığımız için bilmeye hakkınız olduğuna inanıyorum." {n}Gözlerini sana dikiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It is a matter of extreme delicacy, but I believe you have the right to know since we share the same goal." {n}She stares at you intently.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bu son derece hassas bir mesele ancak aynı amacı paylaştığımız için bilmeye hakkınız olduğuna inanıyorum." {n}Gözlerini sana dikiyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Die Angelegenheit ist äußerst heikel, aber ich glaube, Ihr habt das Recht, Bescheid zu wissen, da wir dasselbe Ziel verfolgen." {n}Sie starrt dich durchdringend an.{/n}
languages.original_text: "It is a matter of extreme delicacy, but I believe you have the right to know since we share the same goal." {n}She stares at you intently.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Die Angelegenheit ist äußerst heikel, aber ich glaube, Ihr habt das Recht, Bescheid zu wissen, da wir dasselbe Ziel verfolgen." {n}Sie starrt dich durchdringend an.{/n}

languages.text: 「非常にデリケートな問題ですが、同じ目標を共有している以上、あなたは知る権利があると思います」{n}彼女はあなたをじっと見つめる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "It is a matter of extreme delicacy, but I believe you have the right to know since we share the same goal." {n}She stares at you intently.{/n}
